metadata.description: Coupler.io-authored Claude Code skills and plugins — ICP analytics (finance, sales, e-commerce, marketing & ads) plus cross-ICP capability skills and utilities

plugins.name: coupler-finance
plugins.description: Finance analytics over your Coupler.io data.

plugins.name: coupler-sales
plugins.description: Sales / CRM pipeline analytics over your Coupler.io data.

plugins.name: coupler-ecommerce
plugins.description: E-commerce analytics over your Coupler.io data.

plugins.name: coupler-marketing-ads
plugins.description: Marketing & paid-ads (PPC) analytics over your Coupler.io data.

plugins.name: coupler-capability
plugins.description: Core Coupler.io MCP capabilities — create dataflows, generate dataset context, refine prompts, generate reports.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Identify and remove AI writing patterns to make text sound natural and human. Adds a /humanize command + auto-triggering skill.
